summary: Iteration 67: Green Certificate feature testing complete. 6/6 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed: Green Certificate button visible and functional, PDF download triggered successfully, CAM section displays correctly, Sidebar shows 'Sostenibilita & CO2' label. DisabledTooltip component verified to exist and be properly integrated in 3 locations.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/cam/green-certificate/{commessa: PASS - Returns 200 with application/pdf content type and valid PDF file
PASS - Returns 400 with descriptive error message
backend_api_tests.Green Certificate PDF content structure: PASS - PDF size reasonable (>10KB), valid PDF header
backend_api_tests.Green Certificate with real data: PASS - Works with existing commessa com_a91eab07a36e

frontend_ui_tests.sidebar_label_sostenibilita: PASS - 'Sostenibilita & CO2' label found under Certificazioni menu
frontend_ui_tests.green_certificate_button: PASS - [data-testid="btn-green-certificate"] visible and enabled when camLotti > 0
frontend_ui_tests.green_certificate_download: PASS - Click triggers PDF download with filename Green_Certificate_{numero}.pdf
frontend_ui_tests.success_toast: PASS - 'Green Certificate generato' toast appears after download
frontend_ui_tests.cam_summary_display: PASS - Shows CONFORME CAM, Peso Totale, Peso Riciclato, % Riciclato, Soglia Min
frontend_ui_tests.disabled_tooltip_component: PASS - DisabledTooltip.js exists and imported in 3 components

disabled_tooltip_usage.CommessaOpsPanel.js_line_1777: Crea DDT C/L button - show={!fornitore || no materials}

critical_code_review_comments: Green Certificate endpoint correctly validates commessa ownership, CAM lotti existence, and returns proper error codes
PDF generation uses WeasyPrint with branded CSS styling matching the app's green/sustainability theme
CO2 calculations use World Steel Association factors: EAF=0.67 tCO2/t, BOF=2.33 tCO2/t
DisabledTooltip properly wraps disabled buttons in a span with tabIndex={0} for accessibility
Green Certificate button only appears when camLotti.length > 0 (line 1044-1048 in CommessaOpsPanel.js)
test_credentials: Used existing user session (user_97c773827822) with real CAM data
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test commessa and CAM lotti for isolated backend testing - automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Green Certificate feature fully implemented and tested. Endpoint at GET /api/cam/green-certificate/{commessa_id} generates branded sustainability PDF. Frontend button appears in CAM section when camLotti > 0. DisabledTooltip component is used for UX improvement on Compliance (PreventivoEditorPage), Collega Modulo (CommessaHubPage), and Crea DDT C/L (CommessaOpsPanel) buttons. All data-testid attributes are in place for future testing.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found during testing
